title: acer platanoides var. coloratum
intro: Acer platanoides var. coloratum, also known as the Korean maple or full moon maple, is a deciduous tree species in the family Sapindaceae, native to China and Korea. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, with reported medicinal properties including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Acer platanoides var. coloratum are said to include lowering cholesterol levels, reducing blood pressure, and improving cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the tree are often made into teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
